about.title: About Wegner Automobile

social.title: More from Wegner Automobile
social.text: See more vehicles, insights and updates on Instagram and TikTok.

items.a: You'll find Wegner Automobile at Boschring 7B in 63329 Egelsbach – centrally located in the Rhine-Main area and easy to reach.

items.q: Can I sell my car at Wegner Automobile?
items.a: Yes. You can offer your vehicle conveniently online or book a valuation appointment directly. We buy used vehicles.

items.q: Can I arrange a test drive?
items.a: Yes. Simply book an appointment – by phone, e-mail or via the online calendar.

items.q: Where can I find the current vehicle stock?
items.a: We maintain our current vehicle stock on AutoScout24. There you can see available vehicles with prices, photos and details.

items.q: Does Wegner Automobile also serve customers from Langen and Dreieich?
items.a: Yes. Wegner Automobile is quick to reach from Langen, Dreieich, Darmstadt and southern Frankfurt.

items.q: Can I offer my vehicle online?
items.a: Yes. Use our "Sell your car" form to send vehicle details and photos – we'll get back to you with an initial assessment.

items.q: How quickly will I get a response?
items.a: We respond as quickly as possible. You will usually receive an initial reply to your enquiry promptly.

items.q: What types of vehicles do you buy?
items.a: We buy used vehicles. Simply offer your car online – we'll review your details and get back to you.

footer.tagline: Owner-run used car dealer in Egelsbach. Fair prices, personal advice, buying and selling.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The protection of your personal data is important to us. This privacy policy informs you about the nature, scope and purpose of the processing of personal data on this website.
privacy.todo: Note: This privacy policy is a prepared template and must be legally reviewed and completed before publication.

sections.heading: Controller
sections.body:
The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
Wegner Automobile
Owner: Anatoli Wegner
Boschring 7B
63329 Egelsbach
Phone: 0174 4574455
E-mail: wegnerautohaus@gmail.com

[TODO: add legal form and further details if applicable]

sections.heading: Processing via the contact and sales form
sections.body: When you contact us via the "Sell your car" form or by e-mail, we process the data you provide (e.g. name, contact details, vehicle data and uploaded photos) solely to handle your enquiry. The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(b) and (f) GDPR. The data is sent to us by e-mail and is not stored in a publicly accessible database.

sections.heading: Spam protection (Cloudflare Turnstile)
sections.body: To protect against automated abuse, the form may use Cloudflare Turnstile. Technical data may be transmitted to Cloudflare in the process. [TODO: add details if Turnstile is activated.]

sections.heading: Google Maps
sections.body: For privacy reasons, the location map (Google Maps) is only loaded after your explicit consent. When loading, data is transmitted to Google. Provider: Google Ireland Limited.

sections.heading: External links (AutoScout24, Instagram, TikTok)
sections.body: Our website links to external services (e.g. AutoScout24, Instagram, TikTok). When you follow these links, the privacy policies of the respective providers apply.

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: This website is hosted by Vercel. [TODO: review and add data processing agreement / server location.]

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
